Hero.headline:
STOP EXISTING.
START DOMINATING.
Hero.description: Tired of trying to fit your business rules into off-the-shelf platforms? We create premium, custom-made applications, systems, and digital platforms to multiply your results.

tech_partner.title: TECH PARTNER (MAINTENANCE)
tech_partner.description: Acting as your dedicated developer. Continuous improvements, new features, and security shielding so your business never stops.

web_apps.title: WEB APPS (PWA)
web_apps.description: Tailor-made systems with an app-like look that work directly in any mobile browser.

data_integration.title: DATA INTEGRATION
data_integration.description: Connecting systems, APIs, and databases for intelligent and automated workflows.

digital_platforms.title: DIGITAL PLATFORMS
digital_platforms.description: E-commerce, marketplaces, and portals with flawless user experience.

bespoke_solutions.title: BESPOKE SOLUTIONS
bespoke_solutions.description: Custom software engineered to solve your business's specific challenges.

automation_ai.title: AUTOMATION & AI
automation_ai.description: Automated processes and artificial intelligence applied to scale results effortlessly.

case1.label: CASE STUDY 01: AETHERA SYSTEMS
case1.title: SCALING REVENUE BY 400% IN 6 MONTHS.
case1.description: Implementing a custom lead-gen engine and unified design language that transformed a legacy hardware company into a digital-first market leader.

case2.label: CASE STUDY 02: NEXUS GLOBAL
case2.title: DOMINATING SEARCH WITH TECH PRECISION.
case2.description: How our technical SEO infrastructure and high-intent advertising framework secured a 22x return on ad spend for an international logistics giant.

item1.text: Studiocactus delivered a stunning e-commerce website design with custom inventory management for our fashion brand. Their UI/UX design expertise and web development skills streamlined our operations beautifully.
item1.author: Mircea M.

item2.text: The conversion-focused software and high-load infrastructure designed for scale by Studiocactus transformed our company into a digital-first leader in record time.
item2.author: Mihaela L.

item3.text: Working with StudioCactus was a game-changer for our data architecture. The custom CRM system reduced lead time by 40% in the first week.
item3.author: Ricardo S.

item4.text: The best decision we made for our infrastructure. The lead generation engine is the heart of our current growth.
item4.author: Juliana F.

item5.text: Brutalist design with soul. They understand that performance and aesthetics must go hand-in-hand to convert in the premium market.
item5.author: Felipe K.

item6.text: Our retention rate jumped to 95% after implementing the new client portal. StudioCactus delivered beyond expectations.
item6.author: Amanda R.
